queries.name: Find current term (Roll forward)
queries.description: Find current term, rolling forward in intercession (The time between terms)

columns.name: STVTERM_CODE
columns.description: The term code. This is formatted YYYYTT, TT being Term. Understanding term codes: Term codes contain a year, followed by 20, 30, or 10. 20 - Fall, 30 - Spring, 10 - Summer. Spring is the only term whose calendar year matches the year code. For example, 202630 is Spring 2026, 202710 is Summer 2026, and 202720 is Fall 2026.

columns.name: STVTERM_DESC
columns.description: This field specifies the term associated with the term code. The term is identified by the academic year and term number and is formatted YYYYTT.

columns.name: STVTERM_START_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the term start date and is formatted DD-MON-YY.

columns.name: STVTERM_END_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the term end date and is fomatted DD-MON-YY.

columns.name: STVTERM_FA_PROC_YR
columns.description: This field identifies the financial aid processing start and end years (e.g. The financial aid processing year 1988 - 1989 is formatted 8889.).

columns.name: STVTERM_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the most recent date a record was created or updated.

columns.name: STVTERM_FA_TERM
columns.description: This field identifies the financial aid award term.

columns.name: STVTERM_FA_PERIOD
columns.description: This field identifies the financial aid award beginning period.

columns.name: STVTERM_FA_END_PERIOD
columns.description: This field identifies the financial aid award ending period.

columns.name: STVTERM_ACYR_CODE
columns.description: This field is not currently in use.

columns.name: STVTERM_HOUSING_START_DATE
columns.description: Housing Start Date.

columns.name: STVTERM_HOUSING_END_DATE
columns.description: Housing End Date.

columns.name: STVTERM_SYSTEM_REQ_IND
columns.description: System Required Indicator

columns.name: STVTERM_TRMT_CODE
columns.description: Term type for this term. Will default from SHBCGPA_TRMT_CODE.

columns.name: STVTERM_FA_SUMMER_IND
columns.description: SUMMER INDICATOR: Indicates a summer term to financial aid.

columns.name: STVTERM_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key

columns.name: STVTERM_VERSION
columns.description: VERSION: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: STVTERM_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: STVTERM_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA ORIGIN: Source system that created or updated the data.

columns.name: STVTERM_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.

columns.name: STVTERM_GUID
columns.description: GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration.

columns.name: STVTERM_APPORT_CDE
columns.description: APPORTIONMENT CATEGORY: Valid values are (null) = the same as "N", "N" = not reported (skipped on apportionment reports), "1" = first primary term, "2" = second primary term, "3" = third primary term, "I" = intersession term.

columns.name: STVTERM_MIS_TERM_CTG
columns.description: MIS TERM CATALOG: Obsolete; will be dropped from the table at a future date.

columns.name: STVTERM_MIS_TERM_ID
columns.description: MIS TERM INDICATOR: 3-character; user-entered; the field is mandatory when adding new terms or updating existing terms (This entry is used in the majority of the MIS Reports as field GI03 TERM-IDENTIFIER).

columns.name: STVTERM_TERM_LEN_MULT
columns.description: TERM LENGTH MULTIPLIER: Optional, but required if STVTERM_APPORT_CDE not in ("N",null); 999.99 valid values.

columns.name: STVTERM_TERM_LEN_MULT_IS
columns.description: TERM LENGTH MULTIPLIER IS: Independent study term length multiplier for apportionment reporting and calculation of FTES.

columns.name: STVTERM_CATALOG_GUID
columns.description: CATALOG GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration.
